version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="_B5va_Tj2F5r2kPfabm2" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-484" dy="-252" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="GraphRAG — Query Flow: Local vs Global Search" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="760" x="100" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="uq" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;" value="<b>User Query</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="380" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="qr" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="<b>Query Router</b><br/>(Local or Global?)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="360" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ls_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#6c8ebf;" value="LOCAL" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="80" x="160" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vs" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="<b>Vector Search</b><br/>Relevant Text Chunks" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="80" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gt" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="<b>Graph Traversal</b><br/>Neighbors &amp; Relations" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="80" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ca_l" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="<b>Context Assembly</b><br/>(chunks + graph context)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="80" y="590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gs_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#d6b656;" value="GLOBAL" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="80" x="680" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cs" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="<b>Community Summaries</b><br/>(All levels)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="640" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pa" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="<b>Parallel LLM Calls</b><br/>(Partial Answers per community)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="640" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fa" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="<b>Aggregation</b><br/>(Summarize partial answers)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="640" y="590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="llm" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=13;" value="<b>LLM Generator</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="360" y="720" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fr" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=13;" value="<b>Final Response</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="380" y="840" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kgs" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;" value="<b>Knowledge Graph</b><br/>(Graph DB + Vector Index)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="240" x="340" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_uq_qr" edge="1" parent="1" source="uq" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="qr"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_qr_vs" edge="1" parent="1" source="qr" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="vs"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_qr_cs" edge="1" parent="1" source="qr" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitX=0.75;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="cs"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_vs_gt" edge="1" parent="1" source="vs" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="gt"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_gt_cal" edge="1" parent="1" source="gt" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="ca_l"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_cal_llm" edge="1" parent="1" source="ca_l" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="llm"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_cs_pa" edge="1" parent="1" source="cs" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="pa"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_pa_fa" edge="1" parent="1" source="pa" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="fa"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_fa_llm" edge="1" parent="1" source="fa" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="llm"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_kgs_vs" edge="1" parent="1" source="kgs" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;" target="vs"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_kgs_cs" edge="1" parent="1" source="kgs" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;" target="cs"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_llm_fr" edge="1" parent="1" source="llm" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="fr"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ann_local" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="Specific entity/relationship queries" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="260" x="50" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ann_global" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="Thematic / holistic corpus queries" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="260" x="610" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
